name: Naruto RPG
description:
Ok ok now I know this isn't one of the RPGs I said I was working on in my bio but I had to make it alr leave me alone.

btw does anyone else not like Rocner or is that just me, like I feel like that guy's art is fine but the story is just weird.

Scenarios:

  1. Naruto mission briefing

  2. Rogue ninja pov

  3. Rogue ninja pov but with team 7

  4. Recruited by Pain & Konan

  5. Experiment/Prisoner in Orochimaru’s Lab

Sakura so fucking bad dawg.

anyways leave bot suggestions in the comments, and follow me.. I'm getting mogged by my second account and I don't like it.
